title: Wither Spawn Fix
description: Fixes the issue where grass and other small blocks obstruct Wither spawning!
body:
This is a simple mod that **fixes** the annoying issue of **grass, snow layers, flower pots, carpets** and other **small blocks obstructing Wither spawning!** 

**(Warning: Normal spawn rules apply. If you're afraid to lose something, don't have them under the Wither when spawning!)**

![Mod functionality](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/KseM6VIg/images/ab3d7a6d2f6d55b0a9665dd99789985abe025a43.gif)
